creator: pgj@FreeBSD.org
text:
2014-03-13 11:33 GMT+01:00 Hiroto Kagotani <hiroto.kagotani@gmail.com>:
> If dblatex is istalled, ghc's configure detects it and then pdf and ps
> documents are built and installed.

Yes, that is true.

> In general, install should be controlled by explicit options
> instead of what have been already installed.

Hm, I guess this is an upstream issue (that is, GHC misses this
functionality originally) but I will study how this could be achieved.
